form.formComment: Resuming after a break of 23 months. Finished off last campaign when last of 9 at Sandown-Hillside C,G&E Bm64 May 8 2024 over 1300m, 5 len behind Scorch with 60.5kg at $8. When resuming last campaign fifth of 13 at Sandown-Lakeside Bm70 November 22 2023 over 1200m, 2.5 len behind Prancing Spirit carrying 58.5kg at $12. Watch betting off the break.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-1). Resuming after a break of 23 months. Finished off last campaign when last of 9 at Sandown-Hillside C,G&E Bm64 May 8 2024 over 1300m, 5 len behind Scorch with 60.5kg at $8. When resuming last campaign fifth of 13 at Sandown-Lakeside Bm70 November 22 2023 over 1200m, 2.5 len behind Prancing Spirit carrying 58.5kg at $12. Watch betting off the break.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start, shifted out slightly, bumping Vomo Island.
Passing the 200 metres, shifted in under pressure, taken Pyrois in.

form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of four-and-a-half months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation won by 1.5 len Mornington Cg&E Bm62 November 27 over 1200m defeating Russian Front carrying 59.5kg at $2.70. When resuming last campaign second of 9 at this track Mdn-Sw October 8 over 1112m, a nose behind Bajaria with 59.5kg at $15. Looks forward enough after a recent trial win. Profiles well and will take catching.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. Resuming ran last of 10 at Cranbourne Bm66 on February 27 over 1200m, 9 len behind Markdel with 58.5kg at $61. Second run from a spell ran last of 8 at Cranbourne Cg&E Bm62 on March 20 over 1200m, 9 len behind Bold Response with 62.5kg at $31. Place chance on best.

formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Third-up today and won third-up previously. Second run from a spell ran last of 8 at Cranbourne Cg&E Bm62 on March 20 over 1200m, 9 len behind Bold Response with 62.5kg at $31. Place chance on best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped with another runner on jumping.

form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation fourth of 11 at Morphettville 0-64 November 1 over 2028m, 1.75 len behind Aitch D'amico carrying 60kg at $3. When resuming last campaign fifth of 13 at Morphettville 0-68 April 26 over 1200m, 4 len behind Beauty Rising carrying 59.5kg at $7. Can run well fresh.

formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1.5). Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. When resuming last campaign fifth of 13 at Morphettville 0-68 April 26 over 1200m, 4 len behind Beauty Rising carrying 59.5kg at $7. Can run well fresh.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Jumped away awkwardly and shifted out onto Mystical Wisdom.

form.formComment: Was well-supported at debut, won favourite; won by 3.5 len at Cranbourne 3yo Mdn-Sw March 20 over 1200m defeating Wyandra carrying 58kg at $1.30. Looks very good and will be well fancied to remain unbeaten.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Was well-supported at debut, won favourite; won by 3.5 len at Cranbourne 3yo Mdn-Sw March 20 over 1200m defeating Wyandra carrying 58kg at $1.30. Looks very good and will be well fancied to remain unbeaten.

form.formComment: Last start ran on strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 9 at Bairnsdale 0 - 62 on March 22 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Struggle Street with 59kg at $17. The race before that second last of 8 at Ballarat Bm62 on March 10 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Mallee Gold carrying 60kg at $12. Looking to others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1). Last start ran on strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 9 at Bairnsdale 0 - 62 on March 22 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Struggle Street with 59kg at $17. The race before that second last of 8 at Ballarat Bm62 on March 10 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Mallee Gold carrying 60kg at $12. Looking to others.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly with its head up for a distance passing the 800m.
Slow to begin. Laid in from the 500m until passing the 300m.

form.formComment: Second-up. First start sat behind the speed prior to fading 9th of 13 at Echuca Mdn-Sw on November 4 over 1200m, on a slow track; 2.5 len behind Chateau Vega carrying 56kg at $3.30. Went for a break before returning came home strongly from last on the turn and won by 1.5 len at Pakenham Mdn-Sw March 19 over 1100m in soft going defeating Unriddle with 57kg at $9. Can go on with it now.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after 11 months second last of 10 at this track Bm62 on March 29 over 1200m, slow going 5.5 len behind Akicita with 55kg at $101. Previously second-up ran last of 11 at this track Bm58 on March 30 2025 over 1400m, slow going 11 len behind Midnight Glow carrying 59kg at $26. Not a realistic chance.
